title: rosa × longicolla var. bengyana
intro: Rosa × longicolla var. bengyana, commonly known as Bengyana rose or Bengal rose, is a variant of the Rosa × longicolla hybrid, a cross between Rosa damascena and Rosa fedtschenkoana. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, reducing pain and fever, and preventing infection. The health benefits of Bengyana rose include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation and sleep. Bengyana rose can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
